name: Risotto Tutto Giardino
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a sauté pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add shallots and garlic and sauté until softened.
3. Stir in rice. Stir in wine and 1 cup of the hot broth.
4. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring, until liquid is almost absorbed.
5. Pour in another cup of stock and continue cooking and stirring.
6. Repeat adding broth until grains are swollen, liquid creamy, and rice is al dente (about 20 minutes).
7. Add vegetables, starting with those that take longer to cook, then the ones that take a moment.
8. Stir in half the Parmesan cheese, then serve immediately, sprinkled with remaining Parmesan and basil.
